feed.title: SAP Community - SAP NetWeaver
feed.subtitle: SAP NetWeaver Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can we use SAP PI/PO system and SAP Solution Manager in SAP RISE
entry.content:
Background: Planning a migration to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition (Rise) and concerned about the future of certain tools that we are currently using:

Questions 1) Currently have SAP Solution Manager 7.2 in SQL Server 2012 on premise and  would like to know if it is worth planning some type of SQL Server upgrade for this project or is there any other tool that will replace the functionality of the Solution Manager in SAP Rise ?

Question 2) Having 2 PI servers (Process Integrator 7.5) in SQL Server 2012 on premise that act as middleware between the ERP and (SAP SuccessFactors or SAP Concur), and want to know the same way in this conversion process / migration to SAP Rise, how would this component function in the new Rise architecture, will it be replaced by which tool?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Production system readonly
entry.content:
Hello Team

We are planning to migrate to s4/hana, so after migration some users might need to have access to the productive system to check historical data. So is there any possibility to start the database in read-only mode or how can we restrict users to make any changes in the system, they just need to view the data, how can we achieve this, please suggest on this.

 

Regards

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to Move AUD$ and FGA_LOG$ tables to SYSAUX tablespace
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Good Day!
May we request for your recommendation and advise, on how to move below tables to SYSAUX tablespace, and if do we really need them to move to SYSAUX?
- AUD$
- FGA_LOG$

This is due to assessment performed on our Oracle databases, and as to use Automatic Space Segment Management, they recommended to move above tables to SYSAUX.
Currently SEGMEN of below tables are set to manual

===

SQL> select t.table_name,ts.segment_space_management from dba_tables t, dba_tablespaces ts where ts.tablespace_name = t.tablespace_name and t.table_name in ('AUD$','FGA_LOG$');

TABLE_NAME                     SEGMEN
------------------------------ ------
FGA_LOG$                       MANUAL
AUD$                           MANUAL

===

With this, may we ask for your recommendation re this one, on how to move such.
And also, since we are running SAP on Oracle databases, do we need to perform such? Do we have best practices for this one?


Hope to hear from you soon. If there will be questions, needed information,  or clarifications kindly let us know.


Thanks and Regards, 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Optimal Value for session_cached_cursors parameter in EP2
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

Good Day!
May we request for your recommendation and advise, do we really need to adjust the session_cached_cursors parameter in EP2 database, and if yes, by how much?

This is due to assessment performed on our Oracle databases, and as appeared on our ORAChk reports, we needed to increase the said parameter.
But the question on our side is if we needed to update such, by how much? Currently session_cached_cursors parameter in EP2 is set to 50
===

NAME                                 TYPE        VALUE
------------------------------------ ----------- ------------------------------
session_cached_cursors               integer     50

PARAMETER              VALUE           USAGE
---------------------- --------------- ----------
session_cached_cursors    50           ####%
open_cursors            DIGITS             15%

===

With this, may we ask for your recommendation re this one, on what value do we need to adjust session_cached_cursors parameter. This is to avoid multiple DB restarts due to trial and error.
And also, since we are running SAP on Oracle databases, do we need to perform such? Do we have best practices for this one?


Hope to hear from you soon. If there will be questions, needed information,  or clarifications kindly let us know.


Thanks and Regards, 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: What are the different components of the NetWeaver kernel version?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to decipher the kernel version of the NetWeaver AS Java. To my understanding, this version number is the version of NetWeaver AS Java. From this information, I ma trying to extract the following (if possible):

  • Major version
  • Minor version
  • Service Pack Stack version
  • Patch level

The existing forum posts do not seem to address this and I cannot find anything in the official SAP documentation that explains this.

Thanks in advance for any help!

entry.title: OS upgrade SAP ECC Suite on HANA
entry.content:
Dear Support,

We are planning a technological renewal of our operating system infrastructure.


Our SAP system is SAP ECC on NW 7.4 SP16 with PERSON_NAME DB version 2.00.059.PHONE_NUMBER
We are planning an upgrade from RHEL 7.x to 9.x - with clustering of ASCS and ERS resources.
We also have two application servers (PAS and AAS) on different server.


Following this guide:

 https://access.redhat.com/articles/3569681#overview to realize ASCS/ERS cluster.

This is the question: based on above guide (paragraph 2.3) PAS and AAS are installed on separated servers besides of ASCS/ERS cluster servers, we ask you to confirm that we can install PAS and AAS on the same servers of ASCS/ERS cluster.Please we kindly request your feedback


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is it possible to raise the size of the memory cache ?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

According to note 2470310, the log for successful messages is kept in memory cache. But since we have higher message throughput in our prod system (POP), the logs don't stay there very long anymore (compared to a year ago).

1- Do you know if it's possible to adjust (raise) the size of this cache?
2- Or, if we raise the total memory size of this system, would the size of this cache, where successful message logs are kept, be bigger too?
 Our Goal is to have these logs of successful messages to be available a bit longer.

Regards,

David.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG: CR Types of pop-up not shown in NWBC Screen
entry.content:
This is due to not mentioning of Number Ranges in SNRO 

Navigation: SNRO > MDG_BP 

Once It get maintained Intervals, It stated working fine 

Thank You, 

Suggu Sandeep.

SAP Master Data Governance SAP NetWeaver

entry.title: How to check the top level work item ID in mass (without accessing the details of the workflow log)
entry.content:
With the solution of KBA 3277360 it is possible to find top level work item ID. But the solution is on single work item basis. 

How to check the top level work item ID in mass (without accessing the details of the workflow log). 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Hugepages value for production system
entry.content:
Hi Team, We have received TPO report from SAP where we would like to get the recommended hugepages value for this section "Hugepages not used for Oracle SGA on LINUX". Can you please provide the recommended value to set for operating server and database? We have attached document from SAP analysis. Please let us know if you need anyadditional information regarding this.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP PI Java Migration to PO
entry.content:
Currently We have SAP PI Java Server we need to migrate to PO want to know just upgrading the server to latest SP level help or i have to build new Pralled landscape as their is no ABAP system for this 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Learning the usage of fields ( BUT000-AUGRP )
entry.content:
I just wondering what usage the following standard table field is and impact on the application as the authorization object.

BUT000-AUGRP

of course,  I get the information of normal usage.  But I would be happy if you could demonstrate more detail on this field.

Presumed that we have business partner record 'REC01' in this table BUT000  having the value 'X' in field AUGRP

Of cource, the 'X' is already registered as the entries Standard Authority Group .

record 'REC01' , What special restriction or ,kind of,  privilege could be obtained in Application?

I am looking foward to your answer. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Client Export/Import
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have specific project configuration and test data available in TST Client 100 but not moved to PRD 100.

We are planning DB refresh PRD to TST so specific project configuration and test data will be delete in TST.

To avoid this situation, we are going to take Client export and after DB refresh activity completed in TST, we will create a new client 200 and will plan to import the data. TST have test client 100 and additional 200 client for specific testing.

FYI: we are using CHARM for all TR movements.

Now My question--> Can we import Client export Transport request number via STMS then we will perform post import process via SCC7 or SCC7N.

Is this will impact CHARM TR process(Manual client Export TR via STMS_IMPORT)???

Please advise.

entry.title: Can we clean up objects SAP PI box in bulk.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have one new dev box created  as the copy of existing DEV box . Now we want to delete the not required integration from the new dev box. Do we have any job or any way that we can bulk delete the objects(iflows etc) rather than deleting one by one.

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SNC JCO3 Error: SNC name and specified user/client do not match
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am encountering the above error when attempting to connect via my JCO3 Java application to a SAP Netweaver server. 

Weirdly though, I am able to connect via SAP Logon using SNC, with the same parameters (host ip, system number, client number etc.). The Java program is using the same security files as SAP Logon (certificates). If I disable SNC, the Java program can connect normally.

Some consideration (not sure if relevant):

Since in my case the SAP Logon runs on x32 bit, and java on x64 bit, I am using a different version of sapcrypto.exe. However, all the other files I did not change (certificate.crt, pse file, cred_v2 file). All these files were created using the x32 bit sapgenpse.exe, and they were not changed.

Anyone know what might be the issue here? Help is very much appreciated!

Thank you,

Niko

entry.title: R47 Delete ABAP Session after Error
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I want to find out an error on our developement SAP instance. In SM21, we have messages "Delete ABAP session T208_U1004_M0(Info = Error Message [Error/Core]" we tried to check the dev_wp trace and found the below error 

*** WARNING => ThResFreeSession: free resources of T208_U1004_M0 (normal mode, complete free), rc=ERROR-CORE-ERR_MSG, db_action=TH_DB_ROLLBACK [thxxmode.c 888]
***LOG R47=> ThResFreeSession, delete (ERROR-CORE-ERR_MSG) [thxxmode.c 1172]
ThResFreeSession: delete T208_U1004_M0.

For the affected work process, the following information is shown in dispatcher trace (dev_disp)

DpHdlDeadWp: W29 (pid=7084) terminated automatically
DpWpDynCreate: created new work process W29-8238

Kindly help to find the root cause.

 

Regards,

Subasri

entry.title: Reduce the size of the data file by using RESIZE
entry.content:
How can the size of Oracle data files be reduced to increase their utilization and lower the rent charges on storage disk volumes?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: EPM 刷新出现错误
entry.content:
HTTP Status:400
[{"code":"SY_530","description":"出现异常","severity":"error","log_id":"VoeogAEF7k{HWRCU627ucm","variables":[{"key":"DATAVALUE","value":""},{"key":"MDX","value":""},{"key":"V1","value":""},{"key":"V2","value":""},{"key":"V3","value":""},{"key":"V4","value":""}]},{"code":"UJ0_EXCEPTION_005","description":"出现异常","severity":"error","log_id":"VoeogAEF7k{HWRCU627ucm","variables":[{"key":"FUN_NAME","value":""},{"key":"OBJ_NAME","value":""}]}]

Class:CL_UJO_QUERY_BASE Method:DO_QUERY_CORE Line:226 Text: 出现异常
Class:CL_UJO_QUERY_BASE Method:RUN_RSDRI_QUERY_CORE Line:328 Text: NetWeaver BW 出错

entry.title: Unable to reduce / clean up request reduction in ADSO ( House Keeping activities )
How can I export a ttf file or font file from sap?
entry.content:
I need the font HELVE so that we can convert a label printed with prescibe to pcl. I can only select this font in SAP.

 

How can I export this font to windows?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
